free_text: BP: Updated entry, added critique to
subentries 2, 3 from the NRDC MEMO 4C-3/0420 comments.
At forward angles elastic scattering dominates and it
was not possible to reliably extract 2+ cross
sections forward of 20 degree for the 6 MeV
experiment and beyond 30 degree for the 4.87 MeV
Data received from another data center (IAEA)
